narrative:
Caesarscreek 460 (precinct in Greene County) has 316 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 48.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 6.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 42.4 percentage points.
